message:
Add comprehensive dry-run test suite (wa-1pe.5)

Add 13 new tests to wa-core/src/dry_run.rs covering:
- Error paths: policy denial, prompt inactive, rate limits
- Edge cases: empty reports, all action types
- Output validation: JSON format, human format
- Comprehensive redaction: all report fields

Close beads: wa-1pe (epic), wa-1pe.2, wa-1pe.3, wa-1pe.4, wa-1pe.5, wa-y2e

All dry-run implementations verified complete:
- wa send --dry-run
- wa workflow run --dry-run
- wa approve --dry-run
- wa robot send/workflow/events --dry-run

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
